Jak się zmienił kurs w tym okresie i czy warto dziś wymieniać złotówki na euro? Aktualny kurs euro interesuje turystów, ale przede wszystkim przedsiębiorców, którzy zajmują się importem i eksportem usług oraz towarów. Wczoraj kurs euro wynosił: 4,2641 zł

articles.summary: Prezes Narodowego Banku Polskiego Adam Glapiński powiedział dziennikowi "Wall Street Journal", że polska inflacja pozostaje blisko celu, mimo rosnących cen energii wywołanych konfliktem na Bliskim Wschodzie. Szef NBO zaznaczył, że nie wiadomo, jakie będą długoterminowe sk

articles.title: Pfizer to seek FDA approval for Lyme disease vaccine candidate despite trial miss
articles.summary: Lyme disease is an illness caused by bacteria most commonly spread to humans from ticks. It can cause arthritis, muscle weakness and pain.

articles.title: Kryzys większy niż w latach 70. Wojna w Iranie uderza w portfele na całym świecie
articles.summary: Szef Międzynarodowej Agencji Energetycznej (MAE) Fatih Birol ostrzegł w poniedziałek, że kryzys wywołany amerykańsko-izraelskimi atakami na Iran i irańskimi działaniami odwetowymi jest "bardzo poważny" i może być gorszy od kryzysów naftowych z lat 70.

articles.title: ICE deployed to some U.S. airports as long security lines persist during partial shutdown
articles.summary: The Trump administration said it plans to send ICE officers to help ease airport congestion amid TSA officer absences as they face second missed full paycheck.

articles.title: Inwestowanie w czasach czarnych łabędzi. Oto podstawowe zasady [OPINIA]

articles.title: Toyota to invest $1 billion to increase U.S. production in Kentucky, Indiana plants
articles.summary: Toyota on Monday announced $1 billion in investments in two U.S. plants as part of a plan to invest up to $10 billion domestically over the next five years.

articles.title: GLP-1 drugs are changing how Americans eat. Food companies are racing to catch up
articles.summary: For restaurants and food companies, the increasing adoption of GLP-1 drugs present both an opportunity and a threat to their businesses.

articles.title: The spring housing market is on, but mortgage rates just shot higher. Here's what to know.
articles.summary: This spring's housing market is on, but economic headwinds are pushing back most of the advantage that buyers have gained over the past year in affordability.

articles.summary: WBD CEO David Zaslav could see a payout of more than $800 million after the Paramount Skydance deal.

articles.title: 'Marriage penalty' in Washington state's new millionaire tax stirs debate
articles.summary: Washington state's first-ever income tax would impose a 9.9% tax on income of more than $1 million a year.

articles.title: FedEx beats on top and bottom lines, raises guidance on strong performance
articles.summary: FedEx posted strong fiscal third quarter results on Thursday and raised its guidance following a strong performance.

articles.title: Nexstar, Tegna merger closes after winning regulatory approval
articles.summary: Nexstar has closed its $6.2 billion acquisition of Tegna after winning approval from the Federal Communications Commission and Department of Justice.
